stories.original_headline: Young Mars volcano hides a powerful magma engine beneath the surface
stories.original_summary: A Martian volcano once thought to be the result of a single eruption turns out to have a much more complex past. Orbital imaging and mineral data show it developed through multiple eruptive phases, all powered by the same evolving magma system underground. Shifts in mineral composition reveal the ma
stories.fantasy_headline: New Secrets of the Red Planet's Fiery Mountain Revealed!
stories.fantasy_story: Long ago, scholars believed a fiery peak on the Red Planet had a simple past. But now, with scrying crystals and geomancy, wizards have found it grew through many eruptions. A powerful, evolving fiery heart deep beneath the surface powered it all, shaping its changing nature.

stories.original_headline: Cleaner wrasse show self awareness in stunning mirror experiments
stories.original_summary: Cleaner wrasse have revealed a remarkable new side of fish intelligence. Marked with fake parasites, they used mirrors to inspect and remove the spots—far faster than seen in earlier tests. Even more striking, some fish dropped shrimp in front of the mirror to watch how its reflection moved, a form
stories.fantasy_headline: Clever Fish Reveal Astonishing Self-Awareness with Enchanted Glass!
stories.fantasy_story: In a grand observation, clever scaled fish have shown surprising wisdom. Marked with pretend pests, they used enchanted looking-glasses to find and clean the spots. Even more wondrous, some fish dropped tiny creatures before the mirror, watching their reflections move. Truly, the ocean holds many secrets!

stories.original_headline: Nothing couldn’t wait to show off the Phone 4A
stories.original_summary: After teasing the upcoming launch of its midrange Phone 4A last week, Nothing has now revealed what the rear of the device looks like. An official render of the Phone 4A shared on X shows off the brand's familiar transparent-industrial stylings, alongside a new "Glyph Bar" lighting feature located t
stories.fantasy_headline: The 'Nothing' Clan Unveils a New Scrying Slate of Whispers!
stories.fantasy_story: The mysterious 'Nothing' Clan couldn't wait to reveal their latest wonder, the Scrying Slate of Whispers. This enchanted device boasts a crystalline casing, showing its intricate inner workings. A new 'Glyph Bar' glows with runes of light, promising powerful magic for its users.

stories.original_headline: Uber launches robotaxi support project to aid AV partners
stories.original_summary: Uber is moving aggressively into robotaxis, striking deals with new partners and promising big investments to support future fleets - basically everything it can do except design and build the vehicles itself. (It tried that once, unsuccessfully.) Now, the ridehail giant is launching a new initiativ
stories.fantasy_headline: Guild of Swift Carriages Pledges Gold to Support New Transport Golems!
stories.fantasy_story: The powerful Guild of Swift Carriages is making grand moves into the realm of transport golems. They've struck deals with many allied workshops and pledged much gold to support future fleets. This new initiative aims to aid others in crafting these wondrous, self-moving carriages.
